mapper.select: SELECT DATE(time) AS salesDate, COUNT(id) AS dailySalesQuantity, SUM(total) AS dailySalesAmount FROM sell WHERE DATE(time) = #{today} AND examine = 1 GROUP BY DATE(time)
SELECT SUM(s.total - g.buy * si.nums) FROM sell as s JOIN sell_info as si on s.id = si.pid LEFT JOIN goods as g on si.goods = g.id WHERE si.mfd = #{today} AND s.examine = 1
